use_codes.desc: USE, IN COMBINATION WITH LOW-DOSE CYTARABINE, FOR THE TREATMENT OF NEWLY-DIAGNOSED ACUTE MYELOID LEUKEMIA (AML) IN ADULT PATIENTS WHO ARE >= 75 YEARS OLD OR WHO HAVE COMORBIDITIES THAT PRECLUDE USE OF INTENSIVE INDUCTION CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
DAURISMO is indicated, in combination with low-dose cytarabine, for the treatment of newly-diagnosed acute
myeloid leukemia (AML) in adult patients who are >75 years old or who have comorbidities that preclude use
of intensive induction chemotherapy.

of intensive induction chemotherapy.
